entity.summary: Professional cryptocurrency exchange launched by Austria-based Bitpanda as the Bitpanda Global Exchange in August 2019, renamed Bitpanda Pro in March 2020, and spun out and rebranded as One Trading on June 28, 2023.
entity.notes: HEI treats Bitpanda Global Exchange and Bitpanda Pro as one continuous exchange identity. The terminal marker is the 2023-06-28 spin-out and rebrand to One Trading. One Trading is not yet a canonical HEI entity, so successor_id remains null. The original Bitpanda exchange URL is classified as repurposed because the professional exchange now operates under the One Trading identity.

events.title: Bitpanda Global Exchange launched
events.description: Bitpanda launched its professional digital-asset exchange for experienced traders, professionals, and institutions on August 7, 2019.
events.notes: Exact launch date and time are stated in Bitpanda's first-party launch recap.

events.title: Bitpanda Global Exchange became Bitpanda Pro
events.description: Bitpanda repositioned the Global Exchange around European crypto-to-fiat markets and adopted the Bitpanda Pro name.
events.notes: This was an internal product-name change within the same continuing exchange identity, not the terminal marker.

events.title: Bitpanda Pro spun out and rebranded as One Trading
events.description: Bitpanda Pro became the independently operated One Trading business after a spin-out and funding round, while existing customer history and onboarding status continued on the rebranded platform.
events.notes: Used as the terminal marker for the Bitpanda Pro identity. Bitpanda's help material describes legal and account continuity through the rebrand.

evidence.title: The Bitpanda Global Exchange is now live!
evidence.notes: First-party launch announcement records the exchange going live on August 7, 2019.

evidence.title: Bitpanda Global Exchange: Launch Recap
evidence.notes: First-party recap specifies the official launch on 2019-08-07 at 13:00 CET.

evidence.title: Bitpanda Global Exchange: Announcing new markets and repositioning
evidence.notes: First-party notice establishes the March 3, 2020 repositioning date.

evidence.title: Bitpanda Pro Is Now Focusing On European Crypto-To-Fiat Markets And Regulatory Compliance
evidence.notes: Syndicated Bitpanda release explicitly states that the Global Exchange was renamed Bitpanda Pro.

evidence.title: Why is Bitpanda Pro evolving to become One Trading?
evidence.notes: First-party help material documents the spin-out, rebrand, legal continuity, and customer-account continuity.

evidence.title: Bitpanda’s crypto exchange separates from Bitpanda and secures $33 million
evidence.notes: Independent reporting dates the Bitpanda Pro spin-out and One Trading identity to June 28, 2023.

evidence.title: How to login to One Trading if I used Bitpanda Pro before?
evidence.notes: Successor support documentation confirms that prior Bitpanda Pro users continued through the One Trading rebrand.
